title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
